revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_rewrite here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_rewrite for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = {{{name|Cleanup rewrite}}}
| subst = <includeonly>{{{subst|{{subst:substcheck}}}}}</includeonly>
| type  = content
| image = [[File:Crystal Clear app kedit.svg|50x40px]]
| sect  = {{{2|{{#ifeq:{{{section|}}}|yes|section}}}}}
| small = {{{small|}}}
| issue = '''may need to be rewritten''' to comply with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|quality standards]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|, as {{{1}}}}}.
| fix   = [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} You can help]. The [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]] may contain suggestions.
| cat   = Wikipedia articles needing rewrite
| all   = All articles needing rewrite
| date  = {{{date|}}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
